= Chapter 3: The Data Engine (React Query Architecture)

== 3.1 What the data engine is

Kosha data access is built as a layered runtime:

. Query Client policy layer in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js[src/lib/queryClient.js].
. Domain hooks in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js[src/hooks/useTransactions.js], link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLiabilities.js[src/hooks/useLiabilities.js], link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLoans.js[src/hooks/useLoans.js], link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useBudgets.js[src/hooks/useBudgets.js], link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useFinancialEvents.js[src/hooks/useFinancialEvents.js], link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useReconciliationReviews.js[src/hooks/useReconciliationReviews.js], link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useUserCategories.js[src/hooks/useUserCategories.js], and link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useAuth.js[src/hooks/useAuth.js].
. Auth identity bridge in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/authStore.js[src/lib/authStore.js] used by all mutation/query functions to avoid session race windows.
. Realtime freshness loop in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L535[src/App.jsx] that invalidates query families from database events.
. Mutation suppression guard in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/mutationGuard.js[src/lib/mutationGuard.js] that prevents duplicate local-plus-realtime fetch storms.

The result is a server-truth architecture with optimistic UX and controlled refetch behavior.

'''

== 3.2 Global SWR strategy in QueryClient

Global defaults are defined in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L3[src/lib/queryClient.js].

=== 3.2.1 Default query lifecycle

. staleTime is 5 minutes at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L6[src/lib/queryClient.js].
. gcTime is 24 hours at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L7[src/lib/queryClient.js].
. refetchOnMount is true at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L11[src/lib/queryClient.js].
. refetchOnWindowFocus is false at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L12[src/lib/queryClient.js].
. refetchOnReconnect is always at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L24[src/lib/queryClient.js].

Interpretation:

. Cached data is treated as fresh for 5 minutes.
. Cached entries are retained for long offline resilience and quick back-navigation.
. Returning to inactive pages refetches stale data when needed.
. Focus thrash does not trigger unnecessary reloads.
. Network recovery automatically heals stale active views.

=== 3.2.2 Retry policy

Retry callback is at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L14[src/lib/queryClient.js].

Rules:

. Maximum 2 retries.
. No retries for 401, 403, 404.
. No retries for Not signed in errors.
. Retry transient transport/server failures.

This balances resilience with safety for auth and ownership errors.

=== 3.2.3 Shared invalidation helpers

. invalidateQueryFamilies in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L29[src/lib/queryClient.js] invalidates multiple families with refetchType active.
. evictSwCacheEntries in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/queryClient.js#L37[src/lib/queryClient.js] clears matching entries from the service-worker supabase-data cache.

This is critical because Kosha uses both React Query memory cache and Workbox runtime cache.

'''

== 3.3 SWR behavior by hook-level overrides

Global policy is intentionally refined in domain hooks.

=== 3.3.1 Placeholder continuity (anti-flash)

Many hooks use placeholderData previousData to keep prior rows while revalidating, including:

. useTransactions list at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L219[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].
. useMonthSummary at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L470[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].
. useYearSummary at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L481[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].
. useRunningBalance at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L628[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].
. useLiabilities queries at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLiabilities.js#L56[src/hooks/useLiabilities.js].
. useLoans queries at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLoans.js#L60[src/hooks/useLoans.js].
. useBudgets at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useBudgets.js#L26[src/hooks/useBudgets.js].
. useUserCategories at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useUserCategories.js#L91[src/hooks/useUserCategories.js].

=== 3.3.2 Shorter cache retention for high-variance query variants

Transactions list variants use gcTime 5 minutes at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L218[src/hooks/useTransactions.js] to avoid long-lived cache buildup across many filter combinations.

=== 3.3.3 Domain staleTime tuning

. useFinancialEvents staleTime 10 minutes at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useFinancialEvents.js#L44[src/hooks/useFinancialEvents.js].
. useTransactionYearBounds staleTime 5 minutes at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L598[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].

'''

== 3.4 Deferred Refetch mutation pattern (current implementation)

The runtime pattern is not a naive refetch immediately on every write and every realtime event. It is a coordinated pipeline.

== 3.4.1 Transaction save path

UI trigger:

. Add sheet disables controls before network write at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx#L335[src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx].
. UI awaits mutation at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx#L339[src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx].
. Sheet closes only after success at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx#L344[src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx].

Mutation engine:

. saveTransactionMutation begins at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L839[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].
. Optimistic cache upsert/delete happens first.
. DB write is awaited via addTransaction or updateTransaction.
. Active query cancels occur to prevent stale merge races.
. Financial event is optimistically injected.
. invalidateCache is awaited at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L917[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].

Why it feels instant:

. Optimistic setQueryData updates visible lists immediately.
. Sheet closes right after confirmed write.
. Reconciliation invalidation runs in background on active views.

== 3.4.2 Where the 300ms deferred refetch lives

Realtime invalidation is intentionally debounced in GlobalRealtimeSync:

. scheduleInvalidate defined at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L549[src/App.jsx].
. Each table invalidation is delayed 300ms at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L555[src/App.jsx].

This 300ms deferral smooths event bursts and gives local mutation caches time to settle.

== 3.4.3 Duplicate fetch suppression window

Without suppression, one local mutation would trigger:

. Direct invalidation from mutation code.
. Realtime invalidation shortly after.

Suppression mechanism:

. suppress table key in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/mutationGuard.js#L39[src/lib/mutationGuard.js].
. TTL 2000ms in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/mutationGuard.js#L28[src/lib/mutationGuard.js].
. GlobalRealtimeSync checks isSuppressed before invalidating at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L550[src/App.jsx].

Effect:

. Local write path wins for immediate reconciliation.
. Realtime duplicate refetch is dropped if it lands inside suppression window.
. Genuine remote changes later still invalidate normally.

== 3.4.4 Same pattern reused across liabilities and loans

. liabilities mutation wrappers start at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLiabilities.js#L306[src/hooks/useLiabilities.js].
. loans mutation wrappers start at link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLoans.js#L224[src/hooks/useLoans.js].
. Both suppress local table plus transactions where linked transaction side-effects exist.
. Both optimistically upsert related transactions for immediate dashboard/list consistency.

'''

== 3.5 Query key topology

Key families in active use:

. transactions family in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L49[src/hooks/useTransactions.js].
. liabilities family in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLiabilities.js#L11[src/hooks/useLiabilities.js].
. loans family in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLoans.js#L11[src/hooks/useLoans.js].
. categoryBudgets in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useBudgets.js#L7[src/hooks/useBudgets.js].
. financialEvents in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useFinancialEvents.js#L37[src/hooks/useFinancialEvents.js].
. reconciliationReviews in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useReconciliationReviews.js#L31[src/hooks/useReconciliationReviews.js].
. userCategories in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useUserCategories.js#L10[src/hooks/useUserCategories.js].
. user-profile keyed by user id in link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useAuth.js#L6[src/hooks/useAuth.js].

Guideline for new hooks:

. Add a stable root key family.
. Keep dynamic params in a deterministic object.
. Wire invalidation at family granularity, not per-view hard-coding.

'''

== 3.7 Mutation timing model by domain

== 3.7.1 Transactions

. UI disables form.
. Await saveTransactionMutation.
. Close sheet on success.
. Mutation helper reconciles optimistic state and triggers invalidateCache.
. Realtime event arrives later and is dropped if suppressed.

Anchors:

. link:{repo-blob-url}/src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx#L335[src/components/transactions/AddTransactionSheet.jsx]
. link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useTransactions.js#L839[src/hooks/useTransactions.js]
. link:{repo-blob-url}/src/App.jsx#L549[src/App.jsx]

== 3.7.2 Bills

. Bills page awaits addLiabilityMutation and markLiabilityPaidMutation.
. Row-level optimistic hide and paid-state moves happen in hook layer.
. Linked transaction cache is upserted for mark-paid flow.

Anchors:

. link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Bills.jsx#L196[src/pages/Bills.jsx]
. link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLiabilities.js#L349[src/hooks/useLiabilities.js]

== 3.7.3 Loans

. Loans page awaits addLoanMutation and recordLoanPaymentMutation.
. Hook layer updates loan lists and injects corresponding repayment transaction.
. Invalidates loans and transactions families together.

Anchors:

. link:{repo-blob-url}/src/pages/Loans.jsx#L93[src/pages/Loans.jsx]
. link:{repo-blob-url}/src/hooks/useLoans.js#L264[src/hooks/useLoans.js]

'''

== 3.8 Engineering guardrails for adding a new data hook

. Define a root query key family and document it in the hook module.
. Use getAuthUserId from link:{repo-blob-url}/src/lib/authStore.js[src/lib/authStore.js] for ownership-safe sync access.
. Use placeholderData previousData for list-like surfaces that should avoid flash.
. Use traceQuery for expensive network paths.
. Add a family invalidation helper if the domain has multiple related views.
. If mutation side-effects touch other domains, suppress all affected realtime keys before invalidate.
. If service worker cache can hold stale endpoint data, call evictSwCacheEntries for impacted paths.
. Keep mutation wrappers testable with optional __testOverrides as used in transactions and liabilities.

'''
